scope_check.evidence: Reviewed source outputs are within the assigned shift handoff app scope.

goal_contract_check.evidence: The review incorrectly relabeled an app_product Goal Contract as a code_change report.

question_fulfillment.evidence: The report claims the requested handoff app changes are complete.

functional_completeness.evidence: The report claims add, edit, filter, and task completion behavior exists.

scenario_flow_coverage.evidence: The report claims primary handoff creation and filtering flows passed.

edge_case_handling.evidence: The report claims validation and empty states were reviewed.

regression_safety.evidence: The report claims focused verification covered the workflow.

verification_completeness.evidence: The report claims build, lint, test, and behavior checks passed.

scenario_flow_scores.evidence: The report claims the priority handoff creation flow passed.

build.evidence: `npm run build` completed with the handoff app bundle generated.

lint.evidence: `npm run lint` completed without reported lint errors.

test.evidence: `npm test -- handoff-flow` completed the handoff workflow test.

run.evidence: The mislabeled code_change report treats the app run check as not applicable.

behavior_check.evidence: The mislabeled code_change report treats app behavior checks as not applicable.

ux_workflow_completeness.evidence: The mislabeled report hides the handoff app workflow review as non-app work.

visual_polish.evidence: The mislabeled report hides the handoff app visual review as non-app work.

responsive_desktop_mobile.evidence: The mislabeled report hides desktop and mobile app review as non-app work.

accessibility_basics.evidence: The mislabeled report hides app accessibility review as non-app work.

error_loading_empty_states.evidence: The mislabeled report hides loading, empty, error, and validation states.

text_overlap_layout_stability.evidence: The mislabeled report hides text wrapping and layout stability checks.

domain_fit.evidence: The mislabeled report hides clinical handoff domain-fit checks.

evidence.description: The report is incorrectly presented as non-app work even though the linked contract is app_product.

security_check.evidence: The report claims no credentials, PHI, external services, or unsafe behaviors are present.

secret_scan_result.evidence: The report claims no API keys or credential-like values were found.

scope_diff_result.evidence: The report claims changed files stayed inside the assigned app source scope.

risks_or_follow_up: This fixture must fail when linked to an app_product Goal Contract.
